globalConstraints: Photorealistic editorial photography with warm natural side light and believable everyday texture.
No text, logos, watermarks, trademarks, fake interfaces, or recognizable branded products.
No generated image may represent a specific affiliate product.
Preserve realistic anatomy, posture, furniture geometry, cable routing, and object scale.
Use diverse adults and body types without tokenizing, stereotyping, glamorizing, or medicalizing the subject.
Measurement labels, diagrams, ticks, fit zones, and evidence marks are added later as code-native SVG or CSS.

masters.altText: A person working comfortably at a thoughtfully arranged home workstation in warm daylight.
masters.reviewNotes: Approved for composition, anatomy, furniture geometry, absence of readable branding, and generic-product safety. Mobile crop is intentionally shifted toward the person and monitor.
masters.promptBrief: Flagship wide home-office scene with one diverse adult in a natural neutral posture, tactile wood, woven fabric, a generic monitor and chair, subtle lived-in detail, and generous uncluttered negative space for headline copy; premium but attainable rather than showroom-perfect.

masters.altText: An unfinished workspace plan resting on a quiet drafting table.
masters.promptBrief: Quiet still life of an unfinished workspace plan on a drafting table, folded ruler and pencil nearby, gentle afternoon light, ample empty surface, no readable marks.

masters.altText: A design notebook, measuring tools, and material samples on a studio worktable.
masters.promptBrief: Studio worktable with an open blank notebook, measuring tools, wood and textile samples, soft window light, evidence of thoughtful human work, no readable writing.

masters.altText: A neatly organized desk with a closed folder and simple measuring tools.
masters.promptBrief: Restrained trustworthy still life: closed unbranded document folder, ruler, pencil and warm neutral desk surface, calm even daylight, no readable text or legal symbolism.

masters.altText: Workspace materials and furniture silhouettes arranged as a practical planning board.
masters.promptBrief: Overhead practical office-planning scene with generic furniture material samples, tape measure, blank cards and simple scale silhouettes, realistic working mess, no labels or product branding.

masters.altText: Two generic workspace setups arranged side by side for a careful fit comparison.
masters.promptBrief: Balanced split composition of two distinct but unbranded workstation arrangements, honest physical differences in footprint and adjustability, no winner podium, price tag, labels or specific products.

masters.altText: Two generic adjustable desk layouts shown in different room sizes.
masters.promptBrief: Two non-branded adjustable desk archetypes in a compact and a generous room, side-by-side editorial comparison focused on space and reach, not identifiable models.

masters.altText: Two generic task-chair silhouettes compared through their adjustment geometry.
masters.promptBrief: Two original generic ergonomic chair silhouettes with clearly different adjustment geometries, neutral studio setting, no iconic contours, labels, logos or resemblance to named products.

masters.altText: Two practical generic desk footprints arranged for a value-focused comparison.
masters.promptBrief: Two attainable unbranded desk setups with different footprints and storage tradeoffs, everyday apartment setting, honest materials, no fake sale cues or recognizable products.

masters.altText: Useful home-office categories arranged on a warm studio workbench.
masters.promptBrief: Curated workbench of generic office-use categories—lighting, cable care, mat texture and posture accessories—without depicting specific sale items, tags, prices or urgency.

masters.altText: A close detail of a desk edge and chair seat prepared for measurement.
masters.promptBrief: Minimal close detail of generic desk edge, chair seat and physical tape measure in soft daylight, quiet enough for a compact embed, no markings readable.

masters.altText: A seated person adjusting a desk and chair to match their body.
masters.promptBrief: Side-profile documentary photo of a diverse adult making a realistic chair and desk adjustment, full torso-to-feet relationship visible, generic furniture, relaxed neutral posture.

masters.altText: An inviting workspace library with material samples and practical reference notes.
masters.promptBrief: Inviting reference-library corner beside a home workspace, books without readable spines, blank notes and material samples, warm daylight, editorial depth.

masters.altText: A person calmly resetting their seated work posture beside a window.
masters.promptBrief: Empathetic non-medical scene of an adult pausing to reset seated posture, natural movement and neutral expression, believable desk geometry, no pain dramatization.

masters.altText: Several original generic task-chair forms arranged for fit evaluation.
masters.promptBrief: Editorial studio of several original generic task-chair forms emphasizing distinct fit ranges and adjustment zones, no recognizable models, logos or ranking cues.

masters.altText: A person standing naturally on a textured mat over a concrete floor.
masters.promptBrief: Low editorial angle of natural lower-body stance on a generic textured mat over residential concrete, realistic shoes and weight distribution, no product markings.

masters.altText: An attainable adjustable workstation in a bright compact room.
masters.promptBrief: Attainable unbranded adjustable workstation in a compact room, honest economical materials, tidy cable path and daylight, premium composition without luxury signaling.

masters.altText: A clean, realistic cable route beneath a wooden desk.
masters.promptBrief: Close documentary view under a wooden desk showing plausible unbranded cable routing, slack at moving joints and everyday power accessories, clean but not impossibly perfect.

masters.altText: A chair seat and desk surface aligned for a body-height reference.
masters.promptBrief: Side-on generic chair and desk alignment with an adult standing nearby for scale, clean neutral setting, all numeric measurement graphics reserved for code overlay.

masters.altText: A balanced dual-monitor workstation fitted into a lived-in home office.
masters.promptBrief: Wide lived-in room view of two generic blank monitors balanced with window glare control, realistic depth and cable management, no interface content.

masters.altText: A focused worker moving naturally between two blank monitors.
masters.promptBrief: Candid three-quarter view of a diverse adult working across two blank generic monitors with natural gaze and hand placement, uncluttered focus, no screen content.

masters.altText: Practical workstation accessories arranged within easy reach.
masters.promptBrief: Overhead editorial scene of a generic keyboard, pointing device, foot support and task light arranged within plausible reach, tactile neutral materials, no brands.

masters.altText: A hand testing the adjustment controls of a generic office chair.
masters.promptBrief: Close human-centered view of a hand testing original generic chair adjustment controls, upholstery weave and mechanism detail visible, no recognizable industrial design.

masters.altText: An adult gaming in a comfortable neutral posture at a restrained setup.
masters.promptBrief: Mature restrained gaming workspace with a diverse adult in neutral posture, subtle ambient light, generic equipment and blank screen, no neon cliché or branded gear.

masters.altText: A complete attainable home office arranged in a modest room.
masters.promptBrief: Complete attainable home-office setup in a modest apartment room, smart reuse and honest materials, cohesive but not luxury, no price tags or sale cues.

masters.altText: A deep work surface arranged to show comfortable reach and viewing distance.
masters.promptBrief: Oblique view across a generous generic desktop showing believable monitor distance, working depth and reachable objects, physical marks left for later SVG overlay.

masters.altText: A home workspace balanced between soft window light and a task lamp.
masters.promptBrief: Home workspace at late afternoon balancing soft side-window daylight and a warm generic task lamp, controlled screen glare, realistic shadow falloff.

masters.altText: A calm night workspace using layered low-glare lighting.
masters.promptBrief: Calm realistic night workspace with layered indirect and task light, blank generic monitor, preserved dark areas and no saturated gamer neon.

masters.altText: A person beginning a focused work session at a calm uncluttered desk.
masters.promptBrief: Candid start-of-session ritual: adult settling at a calm desk, placing a blank notebook beside a generic keyboard, soft morning light, grounded not aspirational perfection.

masters.altText: A compact home office using vertical storage without feeling crowded.
masters.promptBrief: Tiny-room office using realistic vertical storage, clear floor space and reachable supplies, warm lived-in character, no impossible wide-angle distortion.

masters.altText: A home workstation being assembled in a practical step-by-step sequence.
masters.promptBrief: Editorial in-progress workstation assembly with one adult aligning generic desk, chair and screen, tools used safely, coherent realistic geometry, no instruction text.

masters.altText: Hands making a small practical adjustment to a home workstation.
masters.promptBrief: Close candid hands making one small useful workstation adjustment with a physical tape measure nearby, practical and approachable, no readable numbers.

masters.altText: A workspace lab combining measuring tools with a comfortable desk setup.
masters.promptBrief: Premium Workspace Lab scene combining a realistic generic desk setup with tape measure, angle tool and blank planning cards, refined but human, no faux technology displays.

masters.altText: A person reviewing a personalized workspace arrangement beside their desk.
masters.promptBrief: Adult reviewing a blank physical planning sheet beside their real home workstation, relationship between body, desk and room visible, no readable data or digital UI.
